title: AustraliaRegisterInterestDetailsV1
description:
`details` payload of one Form A category entry (regime doc §5). No entry
carries a monetary value — the register is descriptive (§3.6), so `value`
is NULL on the Gold row and no amount lives here.

category_name.description: Canonical §3.2 category heading (normalized across form-version wordings).

document_filename.description: Member document key, e.g. `Buchholz_48P` (threaded from the fetch URL).

electoral_division.description: Form-header `ELECTORAL DIVISION` verbatim — the §2.4 resolution key.

entry_fields.description:
Column-labelled parts of a multi-column grid (`{}` when single-column /
unresolved) — lossless (regime doc §4 `entry_fields`).

entry_text.description: The cell / `Details` text verbatim (regime doc §4, invariant 2).

language.description: Ingestion language: always `en` in v1 (regime doc §1).

owner_band.description: Owner band, normalized (regime doc §3.5); null when unresolvable.

page_ordinal.description: 1-based source page the row was read from.

parliament_no.description: Parliament number (e.g. `48`) from the URL `{np}`; the form stamp is raw.

row_ordinal.description: 1-based row position across the whole compound document.

source_flavour.description: Which §6 extraction path produced the row.

statement_date.description:
Statement completion date when legible (`DD/MM/YYYY` → ISO); null on
alteration rows and when illegible (fail-soft, regime doc §3.7).

OwnerBand.description:
Owner band of a Form A category entry, or the owner derived from an
alteration `Spouse -`/`Spouse gift -` marker (regime doc §3.5). Never
`joint` — the register records joint interests as the Member's own (§3.5).

oneOf.description: The Member's own interest (`Self` band, or an unmarked alteration line).
The `Spouse/Partner` band, or a `Spouse -`/`Spouse gift -` alteration line.

SourceFlavour.description:
Which §6 extraction path produced the row (provenance). The whole document
is one flavour: a clean text layer (deterministic cross-check available) or
scanned/vision-only (regime doc §3.9).

oneOf.description: Clean, machine-readable text layer confirmed field-for-field (§3.9 case 2).
